meaning: n.花栗鼠,浪漫女子adj.碎片的,活跃的
examples: Chippy Hackee went home in a hurry!
There is a man stand by the side of those chippy.
Sometimes it's chippy resentment at their middle classness, their university education.
That ratcheted up the intensity from contentious to chippy in a matter of seconds.
"Chippy 1337" claimed responsibility for defacing the website of video game publisher Eidos in 2011.
